description: Color photograph (1008x756) of a CBP narcotics seizure. The image shows the open tailgate and bed of a pickup truck (white tailgate, red taillight visible at left, with a trailer hitch and tools in the truck bed) on which roughly nine to ten rectangular brick-shaped bundles wrapped in black plastic and tape are stacked (the tweet identifies methamphetamine and cocaine seized at El Paso ports of entry). The setting appears to be a concrete inspection-area floor with a wall and equipment in the background, in daylight. There is no graphic-design overlay, text, headline, or agency seal applied to the picture.
